title: Stale hours: admin changes staff schedule but AI still answers with old hours
failing_behavior: When vendor admin changed Helen's Tuesday hours from 10:00-18:00 to OFF (not working), the AI continued to say 'Helen works Tuesday from 10 AM to 6 PM' for up to 10 minutes (the Firestore data fetch cache interval). Customers could book Helen on a day she wasn't working.
root_cause: biz._dataFetchedAt caches the Firestore fetch for 600,000ms (10 minutes). If admin updates schedule mid-window, AI uses stale data. The 10-minute window is intentional for performance but can cause stale answers in the short term. There is no push notification from admin → receptionist to invalidate the cache.
expected_behavior: When biz._dataFetchedAt is older than 600,000ms, _fetchLiveBizData() is called and the schedule is refreshed before answering. Within the 10-min window, the old schedule is used (known limitation).
known_limitation: 10-minute stale window is acceptable for now. Admin-triggered immediate refresh (via Firestore onSnapshot or push notification) would eliminate this but is not implemented.
mitigation: The 10-min auto-refresh is in place. For immediate updates, vendor should wait up to 10 minutes or reload the customer chat page. A future enhancement could use Firestore onSnapshot for real-time schedule changes.
notes: This is a partial fix. The cache behavior is correct but the window means up to 10 min of stale data is expected. Document this limitation clearly in the vendor admin UI.
